field.value: Great seal of the United Kingdom

The seal of Henry III of England. The seal depicts the king robed and crowned, seated on his throne holding a sceptre in his right hand and an orb with a cross in his left. The king is stepping on two small lions, which are visible in front of the lower part of the throne.
HENRICVS DEI GRACIA REX ANGLIE DOMINVS HIBERNIE DVX AQUITANIE
